headline: US raises 2027 oil output forecast after Middle East supply disruptions
summary: Investing.com -- The US increased its forecast for domestic oil production in 2027 following a recent surge in prices caused by supply disruptions from key Middle East countries.

headline: Why Barclays strategists prefer U.S. value stocks
summary: Investing.com -- Barclays strategists have upgraded their outlook on U.S. Value stocks, citing elevated oil prices, rising inflation expectations, and improving consumer sentiment as key drivers.

headline: Energy shock leads BofA to revise Bank of Canada rate cut outlook
summary: Investing.com -- BofA Securities has overhauled its outlook for Canadian monetary policy, projecting the Bank of Canada will now remain on hold through 2026. This shift cancels previous expectations for two 25-basis-point cuts as geopolitical volatility reshapes the North American economic landscape. The revision stems from a sharp escalation in energy markets following the launch of the U.S.-Israel "Epic Fury" military operation in Iran. "Oil prices have increased more than 30% since the confli

headline: Q4 marked the start of rotation ’from gold to black gold’: BofA
summary: Investing.com -- A shift in investor positioning began in the fourth quarter as money managers rotated “from gold to black gold,” according to a note from Bank of America strategist Savita Subramanian on Tuesday.

headline: TACO? Wolfe says Trump is ’eyeing the exits even sooner than we anticipated’
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. President Donald Trump appears to be preparing an early exit from the Iran war, according a note from Wolfe Research on Tuesday.
